title: teams — model relationships
description: Four owned entities. Team is below Branch (which is under Region + Organization). TeamMember attaches to Team via team_id AND polymorphically to Athlete/Coach/Staff/User via member_type + member_id. TeamTrial attaches to Team via team_id AND polymorphically to Athlete/User via trialist_type + trialist_id (or fully anonymous with no FK). EventTeam attaches to Team via team_id AND to (Wave 3) Event via event_id (nullable pre-Wave-3). Every outbound FK stays same-tenant per tenancy-columns.md §5. NO organization_id / region_id / application_id / scope_node_id on any owned row.

internal.description: Team's roster. RESTRICT on team hard-delete — member rows must be transitioned to inactive/graduated before their team can be purged.
RESTRICT on delete. Roster rows anchor to their team for auditing; an archived team keeps its historic roster.
Trials for a team. RESTRICT on team hard-delete — trials survive as anti-discrimination defence records for 3 years past decision.
Team's event participations. RESTRICT on team hard-delete when result is populated.

outbound.description: Every team is tenant-scoped per tenancy-columns.md §3.
Immutable post-create. RESTRICT so archived orgs don't orphan teams.
RESTRICT: branches cannot be hard-deleted while teams reference them. Branch close is blocked by PreventTeamOrphansOnBranchClosed hook when active teams exist.
Wave 3 FK — no constraint until Sports module lands. Nullable in Wave 2. When set, Wave 3 Season lifecycle events cascade to teams (season end → season_id null'd + team scheduled for archive).
Wave 3 FK — no constraint until Sports module lands. Nullable in Wave 2. Used as a categorisation label; hard-side eligibility is on Team.min_age/max_age.
Wave 2b FK — no constraint until Staff module lands. Nullable. Every coach change fires TeamCoachChanged with is_minor_only flag.
Denormalised tenant_id — cascades through team.tenant_id but explicit for query-plan + FK integrity + partial-unique-index scoping.
The coach who ran the trial. RESTRICT for audit-integrity.
Wave 3 FK — nullable + no constraint until Sports Event module lands. Wave 3 migration will make event_id required + FK-constrained.

inbound.description: Downstream modules will attach to Team in later waves:
examples: sports::Session (Wave 3) — belongs to Team via BelongsToTeam trait. Practice sessions reserve a facility for the team's window.
sports::AthleteEnrollment (Wave 3) — polymorphic member on TeamMember (member_type='athlete'; member_id points at AthleteEnrollment.id when enrollment-scoped, or Athlete.id when team-scoped).
finance::Invoice (Wave 4) — line items reference TeamTrial.price_amount_cents for trial-fee attribution.
attendance::Visit (Wave 3) — belongs to Team via team_id; roster-filtered by Team.activeMembers().
inbound.note: TeamMember.member_type + member_id is POLYMORPHIC — no DB-level FK constraint. Observer + reconciler enforce integrity.

morphs.notes: No DB-level FK constraint on member_id. Observer refuses on create when the target doesn't exist. Reconciler catches drift.

morphs.resolver: PolymorphicTeamMemberResolver (shared resolver, filtered to trial-eligible types)

types.anonymous: N/A — trialist_id is null; captured on trialist_first_name / _last_name / _phone / _email / _dob columns

morphs.notes: trialist_id is nullable when trialist_type='anonymous'. Observer enforces the (type, id) combinations.

notes: Teams cascade Organization + Region through Branch. `teams.region_id` DOES NOT EXIST — it's a forbidden column per tenancy-columns.md §5. Reach it via `$team->branch->region`. teams DOES carry organization_id directly (structural sub-brand context), but never as a Region shortcut.
TeamMember does not carry organization_id / branch_id / region_id — everything cascades through team_id.
TeamTrial does not carry organization_id / branch_id / region_id — everything cascades through team_id.
EventTeam does not carry organization_id / branch_id / region_id — everything cascades through team_id.

The `team_members` table is the WRITE-side of Wave 3+ attendance + enrollment. When AthleteEnrollment lands in Wave 3, it replaces the athlete-tuple in the polymorphic (member_type='athlete', member_id=…) with (member_type='athlete', member_id=enrollment_id) — a data migration event tracked in the changelog.
